title: Grip Seal Polythene Zip Lock Bags, 50mm x 50mm, Clear, Pack of (Clear 100pcs (2"x 2"(5x5cm)))
features: Resealable: These grip seal bags feature a zip lock closure for easy opening and secure resealing.
Transparent: The clear polythene material allows you to easily view the contents inside.
Compact Size: Each bag measures 50mm x 50mm, ideal for storing small items or portions.
Versatile: Suitable for various applications like storing crafts, jewellery, hardware, and more.
Pack Size: 50mm x 50mm -2" x 2" -5cm x 5cm This listing is for a pack of grip seal bags, providing you with ample quantity. pack of 100pcs
description: Introducing our Grip Seal Bags, the perfect solution for securely storing and organising small items. Measuring 50mm x 50mm, these clear polythene zip lock bags are ideal for a wide range of applications, from keeping tiny components organised to protecting delicate items during travel. The resealable zip lock closure ensures airtight storage, preserving the contents and preventing spills or leaks. These versatile bags are transparent, allowing you to easily identify the contents at a glance. Lightweight and compact, they are convenient to carry and store. Whether you need to organise crafting supplies, store small hardware, or pack snacks for on-the-go, our Grip Seal Bags offer a reliable and practical solution. Embrace organisation and convenience with these handy zip lock bags.
